name: Granola Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. (150 degrees F.).
2. In a large bowl, combine oats, wheat germ, coconut, sunflower seeds, sesame seeds and nuts (you can include almonds, pecans, walnuts, or a combination of all of them). Blend well.
3. In a large saucepan, combine brown sugar, water, oil, honey, molasses, salt, cinnamon and vanilla. Heat until the sugar is dissolved, but do not boil.
4. Pour the syrup over the dry ingredients and stir until well-coated.
5. Spread onto five 13 x 9-inch baking pans or cookie sheets with sides.
6. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Bake an additional 15 minutes for a crunchier texture.
7. Cool. Add raisins or other dried fruit, if desired.
8. Put into airtight containers and label as Granola Mix. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
Makes about 20 cups of mix.
